name: True Drifter
additional_info: Anytime you would have gained 1 Cutting Pace stack, gain 2 instead. You can now consume Cutting Pace stacks to use Blinkstep without being at 90% or more Ether.
desc: You are a true drifter. Gain double the 'Cutting Pace' stacks and consume stacks to Blinkstep below 90% ether.
